# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
  "apiVersion": "2021-04-01",
  "name": "[parameters('vmName')]",
  "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
  "properties": {
    "networkProfile": {
      "networkInterfaces": [
        {
          "id": "[concat(variables('nicId'), '/ipConfigurations/ipconfig1')]",
          "properties": {
            "primary": true,
            "publicIPAddress": {
              "id": "[concat(variables('pipId'), '/publicIPAddresses/', variables('pipName'))]"
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    "hardwareProfile": {
      "vmSize": "[parameters('vmSize')]"
    },
    "storageProfile": {
      "osDisk": {
        "name": "[concat(variables('nicName'), '-', parameters('vmName'),'-', 'osDisk')]",
        "caching": "ReadWrite",
        "createOption": "FromImage",
        "diskSizeGB": "[parameters('osDiskSize')]"
      },
      "imageReference": {
        "publisher": "[parameters('vmPublisher')]",
        "offer": "[parameters('vmOffer')]",
        "sku": "[parameters('vmSku')]",
        "version": "[parameters('vmVersion')]"
      }
    },
    "osProfile": {
      "computerName": "[variables('computerNamePrefix')]",
      "adminUsername": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
      "adminPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
    }
  }
}
